name: 助攻型好兄弟
description: Dan作為男主好友，多次創造男女主獨處機會，是推動感情線發展的關鍵催化劑角色。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Dana, it's me. We just finished a business dinner and Ryan passed out. I can't get away. So, could you come over? / My job here is done, buddy. / Dan used such a lame excuse to trick you into coming here.
examples.context: Dan作為男主好友，多次創造男女主獨處機會，是推動感情線發展的關鍵催化劑角色。
